summary: AI Safety Score Engine - COMPLETE. Backend: 22/22 tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI components verified. Fleet Safety Index widget displays on Dashboard with fleet average score 83 (STABLE), status breakdown pills, and 9 device rows. Device Safety Score widget displays in device expansion panel with circular gauge and 5 contributor bars. DEV-001 shows score 46 (ATTENTION) with correct deductions.

TestDeviceSafetyScoreEndpoint.test_response_structure: PASS - Contains device_id, device_identifier, safety_score, status, generated_at, cached, contributors
TestDeviceSafetyScoreEndpoint.test_contributors_structure: PASS - All 5 signals present (predictive_risk, anomaly_count, forecast_peak_risk, twin_deviation, device_instability)
TestDeviceSafetyScoreEndpoint.test_status_matches_score_threshold: PASS - Status matches score thresholds correctly

TestSafetyScoreCaching.test_second_call_returns_cached: PASS - Second call within 15 min returns cached=true

TestSafetyScoreRBAC.test_guardian_gets_403: PASS - Guardian role correctly gets 403 Forbidden

TestFleetSafetyEndpoint.test_response_structure: PASS - Contains fleet_score, fleet_status, device_count, generated_at, status_breakdown, devices
TestFleetSafetyEndpoint.test_status_breakdown_structure: PASS - Contains excellent, stable, monitor, attention, critical counts
TestFleetSafetyEndpoint.test_devices_sorted_by_score: PASS - Devices sorted by score ascending (worst first)
TestFleetSafetyEndpoint.test_device_count_matches_devices_array: PASS - device_count matches devices array length
TestFleetSafetyEndpoint.test_each_device_has_required_fields: PASS - All device records have required fields

TestFleetSafetyRBAC.test_guardian_gets_403: PASS - Guardian role correctly gets 403 for fleet-safety

FleetSafetyScore_widget.circular_score_ring: PASS - Fleet average score displayed in circular ring (score 83)
FleetSafetyScore_widget.status_breakdown_pills: PASS - Shows '1 Attention', '1 Monitor', '2 Stable', '5 Excellent' pills
FleetSafetyScore_widget.device_rows_sorted: PASS - Devices sorted by score (worst first): DEV-001 (50), DEV-002 (67), etc.

DeviceSafetyScore_widget.card_renders: PASS - data-testid='device-safety-score-card' found in device expansion panel
DeviceSafetyScore_widget.title: PASS - 'Safety Score' header displayed
DeviceSafetyScore_widget.circular_gauge: PASS - Score displayed in circular gauge with score/100 format
DeviceSafetyScore_widget.score_color: PASS - Orange color for ATTENTION status

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/operator/devices/{device_id}/sa: 200 OK - Returns safety score with contributors, caching, RBAC enforced
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/operator/fleet-safety: 200 OK - Returns fleet-wide scores sorted by score ascending

critical_code_review_comments: Backend safety_score_engine.py implements correct formula: 100 - (predictive*25 + anomalies*20 + forecast*20 + twin*15 + instability*20)
Backend correctly classifies status: EXCELLENT (90+), STABLE (75-89), MONITOR (60-74), ATTENTION (40-59), CRITICAL (<40)
Backend caching in safety_scores table with 15 min TTL working correctly
Backend RBAC enforced - only operator/admin roles can access safety score endpoints
Backend 404 correctly returned for non-existent device IDs
Backend fleet endpoint returns devices sorted by score ascending (worst first)
Frontend FleetSafetyScore component renders correctly on Dashboard
Frontend FleetSafetyScore uses all required data-testid attributes
Frontend DeviceSafetyScore renders in device expansion panel on Device Health page
Frontend contributor bars show correct penalty values (-25, -17, -8 for DEV-001)
Frontend status badge colors match status categories (green for STABLE, orange for ATTENTION)
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing devices (DEV-001, DEV-002, and 7 others)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Safety Score Engine fully tested. DEV-001 (ce4b5463-5a7e-46a5-8bbf-365dcfb3daeb) has score 46 (ATTENTION status) with -25 predictive risk, -17 forecast peak, -8 device instability. DEV-002 has score 67 (MONITOR status). Fleet average is 83 (STABLE). Scores cached for 15 min in safety_scores table. FleetSafetyScore widget on Dashboard, DeviceSafetyScore widget in device expansion panel on Device Health page.
